achievements.title: Never Spend it All in One Place
achievements.description: Purchase the Wooden Shield with your gift money
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Better Grip Than Morpha
achievements.description: Complete the shield gauntlet and obtain the Power Bracelet
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Expanding Your Depths of Exploration
achievements.description: Start exploring the caves of the island and find the Zora's Fippers
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: An Illusion Dating Back to the Series' Roots
achievements.description: Find a hidden room in a cave with a sign
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: What Next, Plant and Harvest on the Moon?
achievements.description: Defeat the enemies in the isolated house and obtain the Seed Satchel
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Running Into Your Problems Shield First
achievements.description: Obtain the Seed Satchel before getting the sword
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: No Magic or Magnifying Glass Needed Here
achievements.description: Trust your instincts and not your eyes, and find the Wooden Sword
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: I-Ron and I-Ron, but I Found a Shield
achievements.description: Do some rock hunting and obtain the Iron Shield
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Big Key, Boss Key, a Big Boss Key
achievements.description: Enter the tower and obtain the Boss Key
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: It's Not a Long Shot, Just a Switcheroo
achievements.description: Obtain the Long Switch in the dungeon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Stunning the Crowd With Your Skills
achievements.description: Pay the old lady another visit and obtain the Boomerang
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Lynel Up and Knock Them Down
achievements.description: Defeat the Lynel in the Graveyard Dungeon without taking damage
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Musical Island Resident Remains
achievements.description: Obtain the Flute and play it for your friends, ending the hack
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Not Knowing if Your Heart is in the Right Place
achievements.description: Search the land for the four Pieces of Heart to get another Heart Container
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho
